thaumic_wards.claim.success: The arcane wards seal this land under your protection!
thaumic_wards.claim.fail.max: Your magical reserves are depleted - you cannot ward more land.
thaumic_wards.claim.fail.taken: Another mage has already warded this territory.
thaumic_wards.claim.removed: The wards dissolve, releasing this land from your protection.
thaumic_wards.border.set: A magical barrier has been erected at %d blocks from the center.
thaumic_wards.border.removed: The magical barrier has been dispelled.
thaumic_wards.border.warning: You feel the magical barrier pushing against you...
thaumic_wards.faction.created: The %s guild has been established! May your magic grow strong.
thaumic_wards.faction.disbanded: The %s guild has been dissolved. Its wards fade away...
thaumic_wards.faction.invited: You have been invited to join the %s guild.
thaumic_wards.faction.joined: %s has joined the guild as an Apprentice.
thaumic_wards.faction.kicked: %s has been expelled from the guild.
thaumic_wards.pregen.complete: The arcane survey is complete! All terrain has been charted.
